intro:
Bathinda is one of Punjab's most important cities, known as the financial capital of the Malwa region with a thriving textile, thermal power, and petrochemical industry base. Its large residential population and strong highway connectivity make it a top relocation market in Punjab. Radhe packers and movers connects you with 520+ KYC-verified packers and movers covering every locality across Bathinda.

Get instant quotes, compare vendors side by side, and book in minutes — with transparent pricing and zero hidden charges.
whyUs: Bathinda's wide urban spread and active industrial zones require movers who understand every sector and suburb. Our verified partners bring speed and precision to every booking — whether it's a local 1 BHK shift or a long-distance relocation from Bathinda. ₹5 lakh damage protection, live GPS tracking, and pay-after-delivery on every booking.

faqs.q: What does a local move cost in Bathinda?
faqs.a: 1 BHK from ₹4,000. 2 BHK typically ₹6,500 – ₹12,000 depending on distance, floor, and packing.

faqs.q: Do you cover all areas in Bathinda?
faqs.a: Yes — our vendor network covers all residential colonies, societies, and commercial zones across Bathinda and its outskirts.

faqs.q: Is insurance included with every booking?
faqs.a: Yes. ₹5 lakh damage protection is included automatically with every Radhe packers and movers booking at no extra charge.
